nasb.text: Can a man hide himself in hiding places So I do not see him?” declares the Lord. “Do I not fill the heavens and the earth?” declares the Lord.

esv.text: Can a man hide himself in secret places so that I cannot see him? declares the Lord. Do I not fill heaven and earth? declares the Lord.

cnv.text: “人怎能躲藏在隱密處， 以致我看不見他呢？ 。 我豈不是充滿天地嗎？” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“难道人藏起来我就看不见了吗？我岂不是充满天地之间吗？这是耶和华说的。
